heading: Rules and regulations
label: 348 Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to make such rules and regulations as may be necessary for carrying out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1953—Act , substituted provisions for rules and regulations for provisions empowering Congress to alter, amend, or repeal sections 341 to 343 and 344 to 348 of this title at any time.June 26, 1953
amendments: Amendments1953—Act , substituted provisions for rules and regulations for provisions empowering Congress to alter, amend, or repeal sections 341 to 343 and 344 to 348 of this title at any time.June 26, 1953
